basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Junior Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Junior Technician (Trainee) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Guwahati Junior Technician (Trainee) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: ITI Certificate in Turner/Machinist/Fitter/Welder with minimum 60% marks.
qualification.details: Turner: ITI Certificate in Turner from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible. Machinist: ITI Certificate in Machinist from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible. Fitter: ITI Certificate in Fitter from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible. Welder: ITI Certificate in Welder from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible.

salary_details.details: Consolidated stipend of Rs. 25,000 per month for all posts.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_guwahati_: ITI Certificate in Turner/Machinist/Fitter/Welder with minimum 60% marks.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Guwahati Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Turner: ITI Certificate in Turner from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible. Machinist: ITI Certificate in Machinist from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible. Fitter: ITI Certificate in Fitter from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible. Welder: ITI Certificate in Welder from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with minimum 60% marks. Candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Consolidated stipend of Rs. 25,000 per month for all posts.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Guwahati Junior Technician (Trainee) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Junior Technician (Trainee) posts at IIT Guwahati is 21st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an ITI Certificate in the trades of Turner, Machinist, Fitter, or Welder from a NCVT/SCVT recognized Institute with a minimum of 60% marks. Higher qualifications like Diploma or B.E./B.Tech are not eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Technician (Trainee) positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Junior Technician (Trainee) posts is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Technician (Trainee) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated stipend of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for Junior Technician (Trainee) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Junior Technician (Trainee) posts, distributed among Turner (2), Machinist (2), Fitter (1), and Welder (1).

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to the official notification PDF can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read the PDF thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with a Diploma or B.Tech apply for these posts?
faq.answer: No, candidates possessing higher qualifications such as Diploma/B.E./B.Tech are not eligible to apply for these Junior Technician (Trainee) posts.
